HRV.safetyNote: Coastal cities are usually more expensive during peak summer months.
tips: Compare accommodation prices between coastal and inland cities.
Use buses or ferries for regional travel.
Book popular coastal destinations early in summer.

JPN.safetyNote: Large cities are efficient but transport costs can add up quickly.
tips: Use IC cards for public transport.
Check rail-pass options before long-distance travel.
Carry some cash for smaller shops and restaurants.

CAN.safetyNote: Distances between cities can be very large, so plan transport carefully.
tips: Check domestic flight or train prices early.
Prepare for different weather conditions by region.
National parks may require advance reservations.

BRA.safetyNote: Use normal big-city safety precautions, especially at night.
tips: Use official taxis or trusted ride apps.
Plan beach destinations around local weather patterns.
Keep copies of important travel documents.

AUS.safetyNote: Travel distances are long and some remote areas need extra preparation.
tips: Check local beach and wildlife safety advice.

EGY.safetyNote: Hot weather can affect sightseeing plans, especially around midday.
tips: Start outdoor sightseeing early in the day.
Agree prices before using informal transport.
Stay hydrated during desert or historical-site visits.
